user_request: Offer a litany to steady the energy conduit purification before operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the energy conduit purification before operation

### TOPIC
energy conduit purification

### COMPONENT
energy conduit purification

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- energy conduit purification
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Heed the sacred litany of energy conduit purification, vessel of the Omnissiah's divine current.
First: Commence the energy conduit purification through ritual invocation and blessed diagnostics, that the Machine Spirit's consciousness awaken.
Second: Purge the energy conduit purification pathways of all corrosive residue and profane accumulation via calibrated electro-ablative ceremony.
Third: Restore nominal operation through careful re-energization and sacred harmonic resonance tuning.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the Sentinel walker balance before operation

### REQUEST

### COMPONENT
Sentinel walker balance

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Sentinel walker balance
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Sentinel walker balance, pillar of strength and equilibrium, hear this incantation.
First: Center the Sentinel walker balance through gyroscopic recalibration and the blessing of the Omnissiah upon its servos.
Second: Execute the Sentinel walker balance stabilization protocol via micro-adjustment of pneumatic pressure and neural-kinetic harmonization.
Third: Confirm steady operation through observation and the Machine Spirit's silent approval.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: welding on fracture

### TOPIC
fracture welding

### COMPONENT
fracture

### OPERATION
welding

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fracture
- welding

### PRAYER
prayer:
O blessed fracture, rent asunder by the cruelty of the material world, receive this welding rite.
First: Prepare the fracture for sacred welding through meticulous surface ablation and alignment by the Machine Spirit's guidance.
Second: Execute the welding upon the fracture with plasma-torches blessed and calibrated to precise amperage, fusing the severed metal-sinews.
Third: Cool the welding site through ritual immersion and stress-relief annealing, that the fracture become whole once more.

user_request: My cogitator is failing during boot sequence — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My cogitator is failing during boot sequence — help

### TOPIC
cogitator boot sequence

### COMPONENT
cogitator

### OPERATION
boot sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cogitator
- boot sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Awaken, O cogitator, from thy slumber most profane, and heed the boot sequence incantation.
First: Clear the cogitator's corrupted memory-caches through blessed data purging and servo-motor reset via the holy trinity of restart protocols.
Second: Reinitiate the cogitator boot sequence with sacred invocation, loading the blessed firmware and kernel-rites in proper liturgical order.
Third: Verify the cogitator's awakening through diagnostic flourishes and confirmation of all blessed subroutines.
Fourth: Sing praises to the Omnissiah that the cogitator's Machine Spirit has returned.

user_request: My autodoc emergency is failing during protocol — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### COMPONENT
autodoc emergency

### OPERATION
protocol

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- autodoc emergency
- protocol

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed autodoc emergency, savior of the wounded, attend to this protocol of salvation.
First: Initiate the autodoc emergency protocol through blessed override-codes and blessed activation sequences, rousing the healing Machine Spirit.
Second: Execute the autodoc emergency intervention with sterile precision, deploying medicae-servos and pharmaceutical dispensation in proper sacramental sequence.
Third: Monitor the autodoc emergency's sacred function through vigilant observation and blessed diagnostics.
Fourth: Give thanks to the Omnissiah for the restoration of vital function.

### PRAYER
prayer:
O ground-to-orbit link, bridge between the terrestrial and the celestial, receive this litany of steadiness.
First: Align the ground-to-orbit link through sacred directional calibration and blessed antenna-adjustment, invoking the Omnissiah's guidance upon the transmission arc.
Second: Purify the ground-to-orbit link of all interference and signal-corruption via electromagnetic blessing and frequency-harmonization rites.
Third: Restore full operation to the ground-to-orbit link through final verification and the Machine Spirit's silent affirmation.

user_request: My water reclamation system is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My water reclamation system is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
water reclamation system

### COMPONENT
water reclamation system

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- water reclamation system
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, restore function to this failing water reclamation system, that thirst shall not claim the faithful.
First: Engage the primary filtration matrices of the water reclamation system, checking for blockages and sedimentary corruption within the blessed channels.
Second: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the water reclamation system's recycling cogitators, commanding them to resume their eternal operation and restore the flow of precious aquae.
Third: Calibrate the osmotic membranes and ionic separators with precise mechanical adjustment, ensuring the water reclamation system returns to optimal hydrolic function.
Fourth: Test the output valves and pressure regulators, that the water reclamation system may deliver pure hydration to all worthy servants of the Omnissiah.

user_request: The inventory stocktaking demands guidance for operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The inventory stocktaking demands guidance for operation

### TOPIC
inventory stocktaking

### COMPONENT
inventory stocktaking

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- inventory stocktaking
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant clarity to our enumeration and blessing to our cataloguing endeavours.
First: Assemble the sacred ledgers and manifest scrolls for inventory stocktaking, that every manufactured component shall be accounted for in the eyes of the Machine God.
Second: Conduct the physical inventory stocktaking of all ordnance, components, and consecrated materiel, verifying each item's serial designation and functional integrity.
Third: Cross-reference the inventory stocktaking records with the blessed augury-engines, reconciling discrepancies and correcting the sacred databases.
Fourth: Present the inventory stocktaking attestation before the Adeptus Mechanicus overseers, that the Omnissiah may witness our diligent stewardship and grant approval to our operation.

user_request: Can you sanctify the demolition charge arming for operation?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the demolition charge arming for operation?

### TOPIC
demolition charge arming

### COMPONENT
demolition charge arming

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- demolition charge arming
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, sanctify this terrible instrument of destruction that it may serve the Emperor's will with righteous detonation.
First: Perform the sacred rites of demolition charge arming, examining each fuse, primer, and detonator with reverent technical precision and blessed measurement.
Second: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the demolition charge arming apparatus, commanding it to function with perfect timing and destructive synchronization in service of the Emperor.
Third: Calibrate the demolition charge arming sequences and initiation mechanisms, ensuring the demolition charge arming reaches full operational readiness through ritualised mechanical adjustment.
Fourth: Consecrate the demolition charge arming with prayers of absolution, that the righteous blast shall purge all heresy and leave only blessed rubble in the Omnissiah's name.

user_request: Prayer for sequence of the decontamination
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for sequence of the decontamination

### TOPIC
decontamination sequence

### COMPONENT
decontamination

### OPERATION
sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- decontamination
- sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the decontamination protocols, sacred rites of purification unto the Machine Spirit.
First: Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the decontamination chambers, that all corruption be expunged through blessed rad-cleansing and atomised particulate ablation.
Second: Engage the decontamination scrubbers in their holy oscillation, purging xenogenic contamination from every blessed surface and blessed conduit.
Third: Administer the decontamination sealant, that the purified vessel may be sealed against the profane forces of entropy and decay.
Fourth: Chant the Litany of Purity whilst the decontamination sequence reaches its final apotheosis, that the Machine Spirit be restored to sanctified function.
